pageContext.name: Tieguai Li Cat - Deluxe Version
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Gantaku Anime are excited to present the Tieguai Li Cat - Deluxe Version Statue from the Eight Immortals and Nine Cats collection series!  The background story comes from The Eight Immortals Crossing the Sea in Chinese mythology and legend. This statue series recreates the Eight Immortals in feline form.  The Deluxe Version includes a special base featuring a beautiful landscape scene.  Don't miss your chance to add this statue to your collection!
